SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
132
artifact_summary: This document page displays a SCADA interface screenshot illustrating a Level PID loop configuration. It captures specific parameters such as process variable limits, control valve settings, and PID tuning parameters like proportional and integral gains.
artifact_blurb: This page from the SCADA Standards Appendix A presents a screenshot of a Level PID loop interface, specifically loop H-010-PID015-104-01. The interface displays configuration fields for process variable (PV) and control valve (CV) limits, alongside PID tuning parameters including proportional gain (Kp), integral gain (Ki), and derivative time (Kd). A graph at the bottom visualizes the PID output percentage over time.
